title: Java & Stuff
description: A modpack made to kinda recreate Actions & Stuff™ onto Minecraft Java !
body:
Java & Stuff is a modpack made to try and recreate Actions & Stuff onto Minecraft Java !


It adds tons of particle mods, uses fresh animations and 3D packs as well as Hold My Items to recreate that Action & Stuff feel.


It is fully client-side, witch means you can use it in your vanilla adventures as well as into multiplayer SMPs !


Here are some in game screenshots taken with the modpack :)


![Java & Stuff - #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f5a09700969b872c2d478aeedcde9d1d7b32c65.jpeg)

![Java & Stuff - #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7427f699452cedf876277d748b25c5d24c1f507f.jpeg)

![Java & Stuff - #3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b45680c30218560dc869c530a1c0e2d814c0736c.jpeg)

![Java & Stuff - #4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/564fedab579acbbd10df3035d5d4b83dac136944.jpeg)

![Java & Stuff - #5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aff0ccff2ba3fceb184ecc37a1b03abee4f8aaa2.jpeg)


Sidenote : The modpack includes InvMove (disabled by default), a mod that allows you to move while you're in your inventory, some servers might not allow that, please refer to the rules of the servers and/or moderators before trying and using this mod directly in servers to ensure a smooth experience if you want to use said mod !


PS : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
